details.analysis: APF sent GOAWAY frame killing H2 connection. chat_session/create got 400, chat/completion got ERR_HTTP2_PING_FAILED. SSE template (ESCAPE2:MESSAGE + CRLF) was NOT rendered ??DeepSeek frontend shows its own network error instead of APF warning content.
details.previous_results: #334 h2_mode=1 failed, #339 h2_mode=2 failed, #344 NOT_EXECUTED. This #347 confirms GOAWAY kills connection but SSE template still not rendered.

recommendation: SSE template approach fails because GOAWAY terminates connection before template data reaches browser. Need alternative: (1) use h2_hold_request=1 to keep connection alive while injecting SSE data, or (2) page-load intercept with full HTML warning instead of SSE injection.
